text.title: Stripe Webhook Hardening Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Stripe Webhook Hardening end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: bound-tolerance
step.action: Set tolerance argument to 300s (5 minutes); verify clock-drift is below that.

step.name: schedule-rotation
step.action: Document rotation cadence (<=90 days) and the dual-secret rotation runbook in the repo.
step.decision-gate: Reject cadence > 90 days or undocumented runbook.

step.name: verify-raw-body
step.action: Read raw bytes before any parser touches the body; pass to construct_event.
step.decision-gate: Reject if framework body parser runs before verify.

step.name: configure-edge
step.action: Set rate limit + (when feasible) IP allowlist for Stripe-published ranges; return 429 with retry-after on burst.
step.decision-gate: Reject if no rate limit configured.

step.name: wire-audit
step.action: On every failed verification emit a structured event (timestamp, IP, reason); retain >=90 days.
step.output: audit_log_destination field set; sample log line shown.
